examples: There was constant jeering and interruption from the floor.
She flinched as she was carried through an angry, jeering crowd.
Then a sozzled client drags him away jeering that he always steals the booze.
Mr Paisley has had a field-day, jeering that the Ulster Unionist leader had been duped by Mr Adams.
If this were happening in any other industry, the Journal would probably be jeering, not cheering, the wanna-be monopolists.
